channel.name: AIToolSync
channel.source: public support email on https://aitoolsync.com/submit-a-tool after live submit-surface verification

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, Codeberg adoption is flat, Apollo is already in a measurement window until 2026-05-30, and Reddit remains structurally blocked/high-risk. AIToolSync exposed a fresh untouched directory lane with a public support contact and explicit AI-tool submission intake, making a Codeberg-primary curator email the strongest same-run executable move.
shared_findings_reused: MARKETING_WORKFLOW_PRINCIPLES.md: prioritize Codeberg-first distribution and proof-led positioning
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: preserved what it is, who it is for, why different, why now
ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: bias toward free-use path and reviewable proof instead of more generic posting
market_intelligence_latest.json: reused positioning truths and competitor-aware workflow framing
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is still flat, so the action must aim at new qualified inbound paths
reddit_post_analysis.json: Reddit repetition risk remains active, so this run should favor a different distribution lane
agents/marketing/outreach-log.md: verified AIToolSync had not already been contacted

verification.submit_surface_probe: https://aitoolsync.com/submit-a-tool presents an AI-tool submission surface and public support email fallback

measurement_window.success_signal: reply or live AIToolSync listing/backlink pointing to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no listing or reply signal arrives by 2026-06-06, replace this lane with a different untouched curator/directory surface instead of re-emailing the same pitch.
